current_life_events: Today I have a client meeting scheduled at 3pm to present a brand identity I’ve been working on for the past month. I also have a reminder that my sister’s memorial service is next Thursday, which I’ve been avoiding. Between the looming deadline and the upcoming tribute, I feel my focus slipping. I’ve been staying up late trying to finish the mockups, but the images keep feeling incomplete.
mental_state: I’m feeling a mix of exhaustion and sorrow, and I’m doubting whether I can deliver on time while honoring her memory.
why_bringing_these_up_now: The tight deadline for the client presentation combined with the upcoming memorial service has intensified my grief and sense of isolation, prompting me to seek support today.
